global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Long-term memory OS for self-evolving agents with dedicated memory layer outside the agent loop for versioning, auditing, and correcting agent beliefs without touching vendor internals; open source and self-hosted.
Open-source framework for cost-aware LLM routing to optimize inference expenses in agentic systems.
Agentic OS implementation from Alibaba Group enabling advanced agent orchestration and automation.
2-bit KV cache quantization technique for efficient long-context LLM serving and reduced memory footprint.
Agent framework focused on adaptive, long-term behavior in reusable engineering systems rather than one-shot assistants; rapid open-source growth signals shift to persistent agent architectures.
Context compression infrastructure to manage logs, files, and tool outputs preventing agent overload in complex workflows.
